The '''YT-1500 freighter''' was a ship of the [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]] manufactured by [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]]. The ''[[Asteroid Dancer]]'' was one.

A dorsal docking claw was considered an unusual but known variant of the ship.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2013-10-15 -->''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]''
